title: fragaria collina dumetorum
intro: Fragaria collina dumetorum, also known as the woodland strawberry or fragaria collina, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Fragaria collina dumetorum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Fragaria collina dumetorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin problems.
